ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship plan */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the plan is associated with */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsorship plan (e.g., Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the sponsorship plan in EUR */,
  "max_sponsors" INTEGER /* Maximum number of sponsors allowed for the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sponsorship plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan becomes available for sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan is no longer available for sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_plans_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_details ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the benefit is associated with */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship plan the benefit belongs to */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., 2-minute pitch, Named open-space room) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., branding, booth space, speaking opportunity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_benefits_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_details ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_benefits_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES sponsorship_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the sponsor is associated with */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship plan chosen by the sponsor */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor's company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the sponsor */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor's company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sponsorship (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_details ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES sponsorship_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the payment is associated with */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment is for */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the sponsor */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for payment processing */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_details ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the invoice is associated with */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment is due */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount due for the sponsor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method for the invoice */,
  "terms_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions associated with the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_details ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_details" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_website" TEXT /* URL of the event's website */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "organizer_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the event organizer */,
  "organizer_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
